blocks.content: Wednesday night. I was barely home when Jonathan called.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bro.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Before you say anything —

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I SAW you.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I know you did.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Bruh. BRUH.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Are you going to say something useful or are you going to just do that.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I'm celebrating. Give me a second. I've been waiting for this since episode one fr.
He wasn't wrong. He'd been waiting longer than I had in some ways. I let him have it.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Okay. Okay I'm good. Dead serious though — how'd it happen? You just —

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: We were walking. It just happened.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: See that's all it was. That's literally all it ever was. You didn't need a plan. You just needed to be in the same place as her walking.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You coached me for two episodes.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: I coached you to GET to the walk. The walk did the rest.
He wasn't entirely wrong about that either. I let that one land too.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: She coming to the game Friday?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I don't know. She mentioned her parents had some kind of trip planned.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Okay. Either way — you good.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: Yeah.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Yeah you are.
